title: centaurea × pinillosii
intro: Centaurea × pinillosii, a hybrid species within the Centaurea genus, is a flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family, Asteraceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Centaurea × pinillosii include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Centaurea × pinillosii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
